label: Model capability
detail: Public benchmark leaders continue to improve on reasoning and computer-use tasks that map onto real desk work.

label: Enterprise adoption
detail: AI is moving from pilot projects into production workflows across large organizations.

label: Labor displacement
detail: Hiring restraint and workflow substitution are increasingly visible, even when public labor data lags direct enterprise deployment.

label: Policy support
detail: National and regional policy support for AI deployment remains material even as governance requirements evolve.

label: Corporate intent
detail: Executives increasingly frame AI as a tool for scaling output without proportional headcount growth.

label: Institutional friction
detail: Regulation, trust, and reliability constraints still absorb momentum and keep deployment uneven.
